Ice_Log: 8AM to Merid: proceeding to clear large iceberg which has grounded on top of USS WYANDOT (AKA 92)s anchor and chain. 1112 Commenced breaking large iceberg forward of WYANDOT's bow.
0141:  Entered area of scattered bergy bits and brash ice
0206: Patches of brash ice becoming denser.. 0215: Cleared ice field.
0328: Entered area of patches of bergy bits and brash ice.
0446: On various courses and speeds to clear ice from track of USS ACHENAR (AKA53). 0401: Entered into area of medium ice floe, approximately nine-tenths coverage.
0520: Broke track to open water, USS Achenar (AKA 53) free from ice.
0656: Maneuvered to avoid small bergs and bergy bits returned to base course.
1124: Maneuvered formation to avoid grouped icebergs.
